Defendants Nader Heydayian, Scott Pelichoff And Janet Brayers Notice Of Special Motion To Strike Civil General: Amended Causes Of Action As A Slapp Suit And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Janet Brayer (415-445-9555) appearing for Defendant Nader Heydayian and moving party. Plaintiffs and opposing parties in Pro Per Hero Chiang, Janeva Chiang and Great Wall Chiang (415-217-8288) are present.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS NADER HEYDAYIAN, JANET BRAYER and SCOTT PELICHOFF'sf Special Motion To Strike Civil General: Amended Causes Of Action As A Slapp Suit And For Attorneys Fees And Costs IS GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to Janet Brayer. All causes of action alleged as to Janet Brayer (Amended Causes of Action 4:14-5-14) arise out of protected activity. Plaintiff failed to show probability of prevailing on the merits. Motion is DENIED as to Scott Pelichoff and Nader Heydayian, the gravamen of the causes of action alleged as to the co-owner landlords is not protected activity, i.e. "creating a false scene of "BUILDING UNSAFE," "paying money to hire officers front he Fire Department to get new REPORTS," "going around [unlawful detainer procedure] without filing any document at the Court and without obtaining a Writ of Possession," "hiring for stalking," and remodeling the units. Order submitted and signed in open court.Judge Garrett Wong, Clerk:R. Goulding. Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Janet Brayer (415-445-9555) appearing for Defendant Nader Heydayian and moving party. Plaintiffs and opposing parties in Pro Per Hero Chiang, Janeva Chiang and Great Wall Chiang (415-217-8288) are present.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS NADER HEYDAYIAN, JANET BRAYER and SCOTT PELICHOFF's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. Demurrer as to causes of action alleged against Janet Brayer is moot in light of the ruling on the CCP 425.16 motion. Demurrer to the sole cause of action for deceit as to Scott Pelichoff is sustained without leave to amend as it is barred by the 3-year Statute of Limitations (misrepresentations made in February 2011, Complaint filed on June 25, 2014). Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to Nader Heydayian for Plaintiffs to allege each cause of action separately and to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action. Order submitted and signed in open court. Judge Garrett Wong, Clerk:R. Goulding. Not Reported, D501.
